name: Southwest Gas Holdings, Inc.
summary: Southwest Gas Holdings, Inc. is a holding company whose primary subsidiary, Southwest Gas Corporation, distributes natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers. The company operates as a regulated local distribution company (LDC) serving customers in Arizona, Nevada, and California. It also held utility infrastructure services through Centuri Group Inc., which completed an IPO in April 2024 and was separated from the company.

products.name: Natural Gas Distribution
products.description: Regulated distribution of natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in Arizona, Nevada, and California.

products.name: Utility Infrastructure Services
products.description: Infrastructure construction and maintenance services provided through Centuri Group Inc. prior to its IPO separation in April 2024.

products.name: Renewable Natural Gas (RNG)
products.description: Renewable natural gas offerings as part of the company's energy portfolio.

products.name: Compressed Natural Gas (CNG)
products.description: Compressed natural gas service offered to customers.

partnerships.description: Cooperation agreement with Carl C. Icahn and associated entities, including board nominee designations.
